ss-4:entityType.label: Type of entity
ss-4:entityType.so: Tani waa nooca sharciga ah ee ganacsigaaga, sida qof keligiis leh ganacsi, iskaashato, ama shirkad. Noocan wuxuu saamayn karaa sida loo canshuuro ganacsigaaga.
ss-4:entityType.en: This is the legal type of your business, like a sole proprietorship, partnership, or corporation. It affects how your business gets taxed.

ss-4:businessStartDate.label: Business start date
ss-4:businessStartDate.so: Tani waa taariikhda ay ganacsigaagu bilaabay ama aad ku heshay.
ss-4:businessStartDate.en: This is the date your business started or was acquired.

ss-4:reasonForApplying.label: Reason for applying
ss-4:reasonForApplying.so: Tani waa sababta aad u codsanayso lambarka EIN, sida inaad bilaabayso ganacsi cusub ama aad shaqaalayn doonto.
ss-4:reasonForApplying.en: This is the reason you're applying for an EIN, like starting a new business or hiring employees.

ss-4:principalActivity.label: Principal business activity
ss-4:principalActivity.so: Tani waa sharaxaad kooban oo ku saabsan waxa ganacsigaagu sameeyo.
ss-4:principalActivity.en: This is a short description of what your business actually does.
